title: Digest — Mar 20, 2026, 07:55 AM UTC
summary:
# Pwarf Development Update

## New Features
- **Self-Review Requirement**: Implemented a `/review-pr` skill for self-review that checks code quality and PR descriptions before submission. This is now a requirement for all PRs.  
- **Hourly Digest Blog**: We launched a new blog feature that summarizes merged PRs hourly, improving visibility on changes.
- **Beds for Dwarves**: Added buildable beds that dwarves will seek when tired, introducing a stress management system for floor sleeping.
- **Dwarf Inventory & Stockpile Zones**: Dwarves can now carry items and automatically haul them to designated stockpiles. A resource counter displays item totals.

## Quality of Life Improvements
- **Thought Generation System**: Dwarves now have personality traits that affect their thoughts and reactions based on their needs and social interactions.
- **Streamlined Dwarf Interaction**: Clicking on dwarves now consistently opens a detailed popup with their information, improving user interaction.
- **Infinite Food/Drink Sources**: Dwarves can now feed from infinite supplies at wells and mushroom gardens, reducing the need for finite storage.

## Performance Enhancements
- **Optimized Database Polling**: Reduced polling frequency by up to 8x to avoid performance hits during gameplay.
- **Instant Blueprint Rendering**: Designations now show their blueprints instantly, improving user feedback during construction.

## Fixes & Refinements
- **Walkability Adjustments**: Improved pathfinding for dwarves by ensuring that surface tiles like grass and sand are walkable. This also involved addressing various bugs that prevented smooth wandering.
- **Improved Z-Level Mechanics**: Removed the stair system in favor of cave entrances and implemented proper z-level traversal for dwarves.

Feel free to check the updates and let us know your thoughts!
